meaning: Enhanced Parallel Port,增强并行端口 /[计] 高速增强型/扩展型并行口
examples: My family and I are constantly threatened by the EPP, and we live in fear.
Tories say that staying in the EPP was inconsistent with campaigning at home to defend British sovereignty.
The British “underestimated the capacity of the EPP and the PES to make their deal stick,” says one diplomat.
Peter Liese, of the EPP Christian Democrat group at the European Parliament, welcomed the court's ruling.
EPP, traditionally Christian Democrat, has been inched rightwards by French and British conservatives.
